top3.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM Patient p
WHERE p.ID NOT IN (
    SELECT e.ID
    FROM Examination e
    WHERE e.ANA = 'P' AND e."ANA Pattern" = 'P'
)
AND p.SEX = 'F'
AND strftime('%Y', p.Birthday) BETWEEN '1980' AND '1989';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Patient p
WHERE p.SEX = 'F'
  AND p.Birthday BETWEEN '1980-01-01' AND '1989-12-31'
  AND p.ID NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT e.ID 
    FROM Examination e
    WHERE e.ANA = 'P' 
      AND e.[ANA Pattern] = 'ANA Pattern'
  );

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM Patient p
WHERE p.ID NOT IN (
    SELECT e.ID
    FROM Examination e
    WHERE e.ANA = 'P' AND e."ANA Pattern" = 'P'
)
AND p.SEX = 'F'
AND strftime('%Y', p.Birthday) BETWEEN '1980' AND '1989';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Patient p
WHERE p.SEX = 'F'
  AND p.Birthday BETWEEN '1980-01-01' AND '1989-12-31'
  AND p.ID NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT e.ID 
    FROM Examination e
    WHERE e.ANA = 'P' 
      AND e.[ANA Pattern] = 'ANA Pattern'
  );

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM Patient p
LEFT JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE NOT (e.ANA = 'P' AND e."ANA Pattern" = 'P')
  AND p.SEX = 'F'
  AND strftime('%Y', p.Birthday) BETWEEN '1980' AND '1989';

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM Patient p
WHERE p.ID NOT IN (
    SELECT e.ID
    FROM Examination e
    WHERE e.ANA = 'P' AND e."ANA Pattern" = 'P'
)
AND p.SEX = 'F'
AND strftime('%Y', p.Birthday) BETWEEN '1980' AND '1989';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Patient p
WHERE p.SEX = 'F'
  AND p.Birthday BETWEEN '1980-01-01' AND '1989-12-31'
  AND p.ID NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT e.ID 
    FROM Examination e
    WHERE e.ANA = 'P' 
      AND e.[ANA Pattern] = 'ANA Pattern'
  );

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM Patient p
LEFT JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE NOT (e.ANA = 'P' AND e."ANA Pattern" = 'P')
  AND p.SEX = 'F'
  AND strftime('%Y', p.Birthday) BETWEEN '1980' AND '1989';

final.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM Patient p
WHERE p.ID NOT IN (
    SELECT e.ID
    FROM Examination e
    WHERE e.ANA = 'P' AND e."ANA Pattern" = 'P'
)
AND p.SEX = 'F'
AND strftime('%Y', p.Birthday) BETWEEN '1980' AND '1989';
